faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Kips Bay apartments and buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets frequently build nests in Kips Bay's buildings, particularly in window air conditioning units, building eaves, fire escapes, rooftop areas, and outdoor dining spaces.
